description: Structure of the causante table found in pre-meeting convocatoria announcements (Art. 18)
note: This is the PRIMARY data source for NadiaAI. These tables list deceased persons whose estates will be distributed.

columns.name: Causante
columns.description: Full name of deceased person in SURNAME, NAME format

columns.name: Tipo de liquidacion
columns.description: GENERAL (full estate liquidated) or PARCIAL (partial liquidation, more may follow)

columns.name: Cantidad propuesta
columns.description: Amount in EUR proposed for distribution from this estate

columns.name: Localidad
columns.description: Municipality of last residence of deceased. Province abbreviation in parentheses for non-Zaragoza: (HU) = Huesca, (TE) = Teruel

critical_finding: These convocatoria announcements do NOT contain referencia catastral or property inventories. They only contain monetary amounts after liquidation. Real estate assets are sold at public auction BEFORE the Junta meeting, and only the net cash proceeds appear here.
